recentTweets.text: Six years ago today, we lost a great American & my dear friend, John Lewis. His courage moved this nation closer to the freedom & justice it has always promised. As Trump tries to reverse John's progress, we must actively protect his legacy & keep getting into good trouble. https://t.co/2aozBSGJzT

The State Department is taking the extraordinary precaution of advising Americans traveling to Haiti to leave DNA samples and dental records with loved ones so their remains can be identified if they are killed. The Trump Administration cannot credibly claim Haiti is safe enough
